$comment: Claim set for Bank ID. Carries a national-ID *linkage flag* only — never the national ID itself. JSON Schema Draft 2020-12.
title: Bank ID claim set

issuing_institution.description: Name of the issuing financial institution.

account_holder_name.description: Verified legal name of the account holder.

jurisdiction.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the regulating jurisdiction.

national_id_linked.description: Whether a national ID was verified and linked at the bank. The national ID itself is NEVER included.
